<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
                  xmlns:eb="http://www.ebxml.org/namespaces/messageHeader"
                  xmlns:wsse="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/secext"
                  xmlns:v3="http://services.sabre.com/ACS/BSO/flightDetail/v3">
  <soapenv:Header>
    <eb:MessageHeader soapenv:mustUnderstand="0" eb:version="2.0.0">
      <eb:From><eb:PartyId/></eb:From>
      <eb:To><eb:PartyId/></eb:To>
      <eb:CPAId>GF</eb:CPAId>
      <eb:ConversationId>uuid-5b574f23-d35b-4616-863c-655a72333d64</eb:ConversationId>
      <eb:Service>ACS_FlightDetailRQ</eb:Service>
      <eb:Action>ACS_FlightDetailRQ</eb:Action>
      <eb:MessageData>
        <eb:MessageId>mid:43b4ce7f-19e3-48f4-85e4-4ed213a073b3@clientofsabre.com</eb:MessageId>
        <eb:Timestamp>2026-03-29T11:06:40.518Z</eb:Timestamp>
      </eb:MessageData>
    </eb:MessageHeader>
    <wsse:Security soapenv:mustUnderstand="0">
      <wsse:BinarySecurityToken>Shared/IDL:IceSess\/SessMgr:1\.0.IDL/Common/!ICESMS\/RESE!ICESMSLB\/RES.LB!1774782399060!2873!801</wsse:BinarySecurityToken>
    </wsse:Security>
  </soapenv:Header>
  <soapenv:Body>
    <v3:ACS_FlightDetailRQ Version="3.2.0">
      <!-- Flight identification — required fields -->
      <FlightInfo>
        <!-- 2-char IATA airline code -->
        <Airline>GF</Airline>
        <!-- flight number -->
        <Flight>2068</Flight>
        <!-- YYYY-MM-DD, omit for today -->
        <DepartureDate>2026-03-20</DepartureDate>
        <!-- 3-char departure airport -->
        <Origin>DMM</Origin>
      </FlightInfo>

      <!-- Display element — Type is a child element, not an attribute -->
      <!-- Only one Display element allowed (choice with APIS) -->
      <!-- R=Remarks, O=Oversale, F=Flight msgs, B=Baggage, P=Pricing, U=Cancelled -->
      <Display><Type>R</Type></Display>

      <!-- Client type — identifies the calling application -->
      <!-- WEB / KIOSK / MOBILE -->
      <Client>WEB</Client>

    </v3:ACS_FlightDetailRQ>
  </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

request.data:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
                  xmlns:eb="http://www.ebxml.org/namespaces/messageHeader"
                  xmlns:wsse="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/secext">
  <soapenv:Header>
    <eb:MessageHeader soapenv:mustUnderstand="0" eb:version="2.0.0">
      <eb:From><eb:PartyId/></eb:From>
      <eb:To><eb:PartyId/></eb:To>
      <eb:CPAId>GF</eb:CPAId>
      <eb:ConversationId></eb:ConversationId>
      <eb:Service>Trip_SearchRQ</eb:Service>
      <eb:Action>Trip_SearchRQ</eb:Action>
      <eb:MessageData>
        <eb:MessageId>mid:75492f7e-336d-4ff1-8ca8-92f5c21896ea@clientofsabre.com</eb:MessageId>
        <eb:Timestamp>2026-03-29T11:06:45.095Z</eb:Timestamp>
      </eb:MessageData>
    </eb:MessageHeader>
    <wsse:Security soapenv:mustUnderstand="0">
      <wsse:BinarySecurityToken></wsse:BinarySecurityToken>
    </wsse:Security>
  </soapenv:Header>
  <soapenv:Body>
    <Trip_SearchRQ Version="4.5.0"
                   xmlns:ns2="http://webservices.sabre.com/sabreXML/2003/07"
                   xmlns="http://webservices.sabre.com/triprecord">
      <ReadRequests>
        <ReservationReadRequest>

          <!-- Search by Flight — primary search mode -->
          <FlightCriteria>
            <Flight>
              <!-- flight number e.g. 2057 -->
              <FlightNumber>2016</FlightNumber>
              <!-- 3-char airport code -->
              <DepartureAirport>FRA</DepartureAirport>
              <!-- exact date match -->
              <DepartureDateTime Is="2026-03-23T00:00:00"/>
              <!-- ALTERNATIVE date matching (use one at a time): -->
              <!-- all flights after this date -->
              <!-- <DepartureDateTime After="2026-03-19T00:00:00"/> -->
              <!-- all flights before this date -->
              <!-- <DepartureDateTime Before="2026-03-21T00:00:00"/> -->
              <!-- 2-char IATA airline code -->
              <AirlineCode>GF</AirlineCode>
            </Flight>
          </FlightCriteria>

          <!-- ALTERNATIVE: Search by PNR locator (use INSTEAD of FlightCriteria) -->
          <!-- <LocatorCriteria> -->
          <!--   <Locator>ABC123</Locator> -->
          <!-- </LocatorCriteria> -->

          <!-- point-of-sale airline filter -->
          <PosCriteria AirlineCode="GF"/>

          <!-- TripSearchBlob = full PNR blob (most data), STL = structured format -->
          <!-- SearchType: ACTIVE = current bookings, INACTIVE = cancelled, BOTH = all -->
          <ReturnOptions ViewName="TripSearchBlob"
                         ResponseFormat="STL"
                         SearchType="ACTIVE"
                         MaxItemsReturned="800">
            <!-- Request ALL subject areas for maximum data -->
            <SubjectAreas>
              <!-- PNR locator, create date, status -->
              <SubjectArea>HEADER</SubjectArea>
              <!-- passenger names -->
              <SubjectArea>NAME</SubjectArea>
              <!-- pax type, gender, DOB, nationality -->
              <SubjectArea>PASSENGERDETAILS</SubjectArea>
              <!-- pre-reserved seat assignments -->
              <SubjectArea>PRERESERVEDSEAT</SubjectArea>
              <!-- ticket numbers, status, coupons -->
              <SubjectArea>TICKETS</SubjectArea>
              <!-- flight segments, routing -->
              <SubjectArea>ITINERARY</SubjectArea>
              <!-- loyalty program info -->
              <SubjectArea>LOYALTY</SubjectArea>
              <!-- frequent traveler data -->
              <SubjectArea>FQTV</SubjectArea>
              <!-- extended frequent traveler -->
              <SubjectArea>EXT_FQTV</SubjectArea>
              <!-- special service requests (WCHR, MEAL, etc.) -->
              <SubjectArea>SSR</SubjectArea>
              <!-- other service information -->
              <SubjectArea>OSI</SubjectArea>
              <!-- PNR remarks / annotations -->
              <SubjectArea>REMARKS</SubjectArea>
              <!-- billing / mailing address -->
              <SubjectArea>ADDRESS</SubjectArea>
              <!-- email addresses -->
              <SubjectArea>EMAIL</SubjectArea>
              <!-- phone / contact numbers -->
              <SubjectArea>PHONE</SubjectArea>
              <!-- group booking info -->
              <SubjectArea>GROUP</SubjectArea>
              <!-- agency / agent who made booking -->
              <SubjectArea>RECEIVED_FROM</SubjectArea>
              <!-- accounting / payment data -->
              <SubjectArea>ACCOUNTING</SubjectArea>
              <!-- general facts -->
              <SubjectArea>GENERAL_FACTS</SubjectArea>
              <!-- PNR change history -->
              <SubjectArea>HISTORY</SubjectArea>
              <!-- profile references -->
              <SubjectArea>PROFILE_INDEX</SubjectArea>
              <!-- option / queue details -->
              <SubjectArea>OPTION_QUEUE</SubjectArea>
              <!-- queue placement info -->
              <SubjectArea>QUEUE_PLACE</SubjectArea>
              <!-- service info -->
              <SubjectArea>SERVICE_INFORMATION</SubjectArea>
              <!-- divide-in-party (split PNR) details -->
              <SubjectArea>DIVIDE</SubjectArea>
              <!-- associated content references -->
              <SubjectArea>ASSOCIATED_CONTENT</SubjectArea>
              <!-- ancillary bookings: bags, meals, seats -->
              <SubjectArea>ANCILLARY_SERVICES</SubjectArea>
              <!-- ticket delivery address -->
              <SubjectArea>DELIVERY_ADDRESS</SubjectArea>
            </SubjectAreas>
          </ReturnOptions>
        </ReservationReadRequest>
      </ReadRequests>
    </Trip_SearchRQ>
  </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

    <v2:VerifyFlightDetailsRQ Version="2.0.1">
      <v2:OriginDestinationInformation>
        <v2:FlightSegment DepartureDateTime="{{departureMmDd}}T00:00">
          <v2:DestinationLocation LocationCode="{{destination}}"/>
          <v2:MarketingAirline Code="{{airlineCode}}" FlightNumber="{{flightNumber}}"/>
          <v2:OriginLocation LocationCode="{{origin}}"/>
        </v2:FlightSegment>
      </v2:OriginDestinationInformation>
    </v2:VerifyFlightDetailsRQ>
  </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>
